programmes.show_description: Laurie's Lair: Australian spin-off from the popular US documentary series. Lucas Callaghan and Adam McDonald explore a sprawling property that is owned by a larrikin demolisher.
Midweek action from across the Football League, including Middlesbrough v Charlton, West Brom v Southampton, Coventry v Preston and Wrexham v Hull in the Championship.
Sorry Pal, Wrong Number: Drama series about a loveable rogue. Arthur's new gambling venture involves Terry taking on the prestigious task of guarding three public telephone boxes.
This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.
Shopping from home.
All the racing, glamour and fun of Derby Day at Epsom Downs, including performances from Shergar and Sea The Stars and interviews with sports and entertainment personalities.
Brian Moore kicks off 1978 with a New Year's Day programme featuring West Ham United versus Leicester City, Bristol City versus Nottingham Forest, and Everton taking on Arsenal.
Brian Moore presents a special FA Cup edition from January 1978 that features 16 goals as Liverpool face Chelsea, Everton host Aston Villa, and Sheffield United face Arsenal.
Ceremony for the Dead: Europe-based adventure series. The wife of a president hires the Protectors to guard her critically-ill husband when she fears he may be kidnapped.
Oli Bell and the team are at Cheltenham ahead of the third day of the 2026 Cheltenham Festival where the Stayers' Hurdle and the Ryanair Chase are the feature races.
Phantom Assassin: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade returns to Australia's Fitzroy river to catch the Glyphis shark, a fish that is so elusive that it was only found in the 21st century.
Loving Arms: Classic '70s police series. Regan must find a source of illegal guns that are flooding the market before further lives are lost.
The Burning: Classic detective series. Dempsey's New York past catches up with him as his life is threatened by an old enemy that forces him undercover with Makepeace as his control.
The Kona Winds: Classic US action drama series. When Thomas prevents a suicide attempt in the ocean, he learns that the victim thought that her husband would murder her first.
Birthday Party: Classic US detective drama. Theo's niece is kidnapped on her birthday by criminals who demand the release of an accomplice who is in custody for killing a policeman.
Rival Eyes: Classic drama. Women spell trouble for Ken and Harry when an Irish builder asks Ken to investigate a break-in and theft of cash at his office while Harry moves house.
Lady Luck: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan is sure that he knows the identity of a robber but has a difficult time proving it.
Willesden Suite: Drama series about the dealings of a rogue. Terry's job as security for the local Rotary Club offers Arthur a chance to gain some much-needed respectability.
Bigfoot in Alabama: US documentary series. Mike Wolfe and Frank Fritz travel through the Deep South of America and meet a car hobbyist whose yard resembles a vintage parking lot.
The Red Indian: Australian spin-off from the popular US documentary series. Lucas Callaghan and Adam McDonald meet an old couple who keep a huge collection of Australiana.
Busted Parts and Breakdowns: Nail-biting documentary series. Mount Redoubt in southern Alaska erupts and ejects tons of ash into the sky that prevents flights across the state.
Thrilling crime action film remake starring Denzel Washington and John Travolta, 2009. Armed men hijack a New York City subway train to hold its passengers hostage for a ransom.
Latest news from the world of entertainment.
Thrilling crime action film remake starring Denzel Washington and John Travolta, 2009. Armed men hijack a New York City subway train to hold its passengers hostage for a ransom.
Action from the top flight of French football, including Lyon v Paris FC, Nice v Rennes, Lille v Lorient, Toulouse v Marseille, PSG v Monaco and Auxerre v Strasbourg.
Pilot: The first episode of the thrilling spy drama. John Weir's world is blown to pieces after what appears to be another successful day on the job.
Tad Overwhelming: US cooking competition. A rocky first dinner service for both teams involves raw meat, bad communication, and celebrities including singer Martina McBride.
The Car Lot Baggers: Drama series about a loveable rogue. When an unscrupulous builder wants a piece of land occupied by a friend of Arthur, he hires thugs to put the frighteners on.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.
Shopping from home.
From Nijinsky to Tiger Roll, Ed Chamberlin introduces some of the great racehorses of the modern era - enjoy Best Mate's third Gold Cup and Shergar racing to Derby glory.
Dickie Davies presents highlights from January 1978 - the action this time includes Luton taking on Oldham, Ipswich facing Manchester United, and Newcastle against Middlesbrough.
Goals aplenty in this episode as Brian Moore introduces highlights from January 1978 - Chelsea take on Ipswich Town, Everton face Wolves, and Manchester United host Derby County.
It Was All Over in Leipzig: Adventure series. The team are called in to discover who is threatening a Mediterranean government, but the answer lies uncomfortably close to home.
Oli Bell and the team are at Cheltenham ahead of the final day of the 2026 Cheltenham Festival where the Gold Cup is the feature race.
The Kona Winds: Classic US action drama series. When Thomas prevents a suicide attempt in the ocean, he learns that the victim thought that her husband would murder her first.
Lady Luck: Classic '70s police drama series. Regan is sure that he knows the identity of a robber but has a difficult time proving it.
Jericho Scam: Classic detective series. When Dempsey is accused of murdering a small-time criminal, Makepeace puts her career on the line as she tries to prove his innocence.
The Hotel Dick: Classic US action drama series. When he takes a job as a hotel detective, Thomas's bids to catch a cat burglar are complicated by his relationship with a hooker.
A Summer Madness: Classic US detective drama. Theo investigates the bombing of a restaurant while unaware that one of his fellow detectives has a vested interest in the case.
Burning Ambition: Classic drama starring Michael Elphick. Ken finds himself being interrogated about a crime he did not commit thanks to a jilted lover and a lying husband.
On the Run: Classic crime drama. A convicted armed robber escapes from jail and goes gunning for Regan.
Windows: Drama series about a loveable rogue. Arthur plans to become a player in the fitness industry with an aerobics studio, and Terry gets involved with two Italian families.
The Butches Shed: Australian spin-off from the US series. Lucas Callaghan and Adam McDonald find plenty to buy in a maze of sheds that includes a mystery keyboard instrument.
Race for the Finish: Nail-biting documentary series. With the end of the winter trucking season near, Alex Debogorski tries to pull ahead of rival Hugh Rowland but faces a delay.
Arctic Thaw: Nail-biting documentary series. As the season draws to a close, Lisa Kelly faces a final challenge as she hauls a load of hazardous waste without the use of her brakes.
Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling - the roster features world-class talent including Jon Moxley, Toni Storm, MJF, Ricochet and Adam Page.
